issues.title: Grid conflict when walkable layer is active
issues.description: The visual snap/alignment grid and the walkable area grid clash when their cell sizes differ. The snap grid should auto-hide when the pathing layer is active.

issues.title: Chevron arrowhead renders as filled triangle
issues.description: The chevron arrowhead style looks identical to triangle — both render as closed filled shapes. Chevron should be an open V shape with no fill.

issues.title: Elements drawn on wrong layer
issues.description: Drawing certain shapes while on the Content layer places them on Markup (based on type-to-layer mapping). The element becomes invisible/unselectable until you switch layers.

issues.title: Canvas and MapEditor components growing too large
issues.description: MapEditor.tsx and Canvas.tsx are accumulating too many props and helpers. Each new tool adds more conditional event routing. Should refactor toward a tool-context or registry pattern.

issues.title: Copy-paste undo flooding
issues.description: Pasting multiple elements created one undo entry per element. Fixed in Phase 9 with addElements bulk mutation.

issues.title: Booth popovers not showing in mobile viewer
issues.description: Clicking a booth in mobile mode does not show the popover. The render is gated by !isMobile in MapViewer.tsx. The popover uses position:fixed with screen coords which would place it outside the 390x844 mobile container. Needs either a bottom-sheet pattern for mobile or coordinate conversion relative to the container.

issues.title: Wayfinding inputs extend off screen in mobile viewer
issues.description: The DirectionsPanel from/to LocationField dropdowns use absolute positioning with left-0 right-0 which stretches to the containing block width. In the mobile container this causes inputs and dropdown suggestions to overflow. Needs max-width constraints or overflow handling within the mobile viewport.

issues.title: Escape does not close icon picker
issues.description: When the icon picker is open, pressing Escape does not close it or switch back to the select tool. The keyboard shortcuts hook ignores key events when an input is focused, and the icon picker's search input captures focus. The only way to exit is to place an icon. Fix: either have IconPicker handle Escape directly, or exempt Escape from the input-focused guard in useKeyboardShortcuts.

issues.title: ElementShape RectShape fallback uses growing exclusion list
issues.description: The generic RectShape fallback in ElementShape.tsx uses a negative check (type !== booth && type !== session_area && type !== meeting_room && ...). Every new element type with a custom shape component must be added to this list or both shapes render on top of each other. Should invert to a Set of custom-rendered types or restructure as an if/else chain.
